scenario.name: smoke-multiselect
scenario.prompt:
Call the AskUserQuestion tool exactly once with a SINGLE multi-select question
(allow selecting more than one option) asking which features to enable, with these
three options: Auth, Billing, Audit.
After I answer, reply with exactly: "Enabled: <the features I chose, comma-separated>."
and nothing else.
